records.morph: [imp. Underwrote (?), Obs. Underwrit (<?/); p. p. Underwritten (?), Obs. Underwrit; p. pr. & vb. n. Underwriting.]

defs: To write under something else; to subscribe.
quotes: What addition and change I have made I have here underwritten.

defs: To subscribe one's name to for insurance, especially for marine insurance; to write one's name under, or set one's name to, as a policy of insurance, for the purpose of becoming answerable for loss or damage, on consideration of receiving a certain premium per cent; as, individuals, as well as companies, may underwrite policies of insurance.
quotes: The broker who procures the insurance ought not, by underwriting the policy, to deprive the parties of his unbiased testimony.

defs: To practice the business of insuring; to take a risk of insurance on a vessel or the like.
